title: Junior Investment Banker at CDSL South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at CDSL South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
CDSL South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Coimbatore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CDSL South Asia Partners:
CDSL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
